title: astracantha fallax
intro: Astracantha fallax, also known as Cytisus scoparius subsp. fallax, is a sub-species of the gorse plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astracantha fallax include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Astracantha fallax can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
